title: cupressus madeirensis
intro: Cupressus madeirensis, also known as the Madeira cypress or Atlantic cypress, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Atlantic islands of Macaronesia. The medicinal properties of Cupressus madeirensis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support the immune system. Cupressus madeirensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to make topical creams, ointments, and salves for skin and wound care.
